description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior walls are predominantly white with large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light. The layout features an open-plan living area, visible kitchen, and at least one bedroom, with interior partitions clearly dividing the spaces. The property is set on a green lawn with landscaped areas, including several flowering trees and shrubs. The front entrance is accessible via a small set of steps, and the overall structure is compact and rectangular. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped on the sides and large panes facing the garden.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and landscaped surroundings. The design is minimalist with open-plan interiors and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and a small staircase leading up to the door, with flowering trees on either side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall, smaller windows, and a more private garden area with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the open-plan living area, large sliding glass doors, and a clear view of the kitchen and interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional glass windows, the main living space, and the transition between indoor and outdoor areas.
